description.zh: 你的方案如何创造价值

description.en: Jobs, pains, and gains of one segment
description.zh: 一个客户细分的任务、痛点与收益

subtitle.en: Match your value map to one clear customer profile
subtitle.zh: 把你的价值地图匹配到一个清晰的客户画像

description.zh: 产品服务、痛点缓解、收益创造

headline.en: Match customer jobs, pains, and gains with an offer
headline.zh: 把客户任务、痛点和收益与产品匹配起来

whyOpen.en: Use this when BMC's customer segment or value proposition is too broad to test.
whyOpen.zh: 当 BMC 里的客户细分或价值主张过于宽泛、难以测试时使用。

audience.en: Teams doing customer discovery, offer design, landing pages, or sales messaging.
audience.zh: 适合做客户探索、产品设计、落地页或销售话术的团队。

firstSteps.en: Fill one customer segment at a time.
firstSteps.zh: 一次只填一个客户细分。

firstSteps.en: Mark which pain relievers and gain creators still need evidence.
firstSteps.zh: 标出哪些痛点缓解和收益创造仍需证据。

outcomes.en: A testable value proposition and the strongest fit assumptions.
outcomes.zh: 一套可测试的价值主张，以及最关键的匹配假设。

practicePrompts.en: Which pain is expensive enough that the customer would switch behavior?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪个痛点足够昂贵，能让客户改变行为？

business-model-canvas.en: Lift the validated Value Proposition + Customer Segment back into the BMC so the rest of the model adapts.
business-model-canvas.zh: 把验证过的价值主张 + 客户细分搬回 BMC,让模型其余部分跟着改。

empathy-map.en: Deep-dive on what the customer thinks / says / feels before listing Jobs and Pains. Anchors the right side.
empathy-map.zh: 在写工作和痛点之前,先把客户在想 / 说 / 感受什么搞清楚。给右侧定锚。

jobs-to-be-done.en: Sharpen Customer Jobs into a situation → motivation → outcome story before using Bain tags to classify value layers.
jobs-to-be-done.zh: 先把客户工作锐化成「情境 → 动机 → 结果」故事，再用 Bain 标签分类价值层级。

ad-lib-value-proposition.en: Compress the entire VPC into one sentence the team can say out loud — exposes weak spots.
ad-lib-value-proposition.zh: 把整张 VPC 压缩成一句团队能朗读出口的话 —— 弱点立刻暴露。

customer-journey.en: Walk Pains and Gains across the customer's timeline so you see when each one bites.
customer-journey.zh: 把痛点和收益沿着客户的时间线铺开,看清每一项在什么节点起作用。

design-criteria-canvas.en: Translate the validated Pains and Gains into design criteria for the offering.
design-criteria-canvas.zh: 把验证过的痛点和收益翻译成产品设计的硬约束。

experiment-canvas.en: Pick the riskiest Pain Reliever or Gain Creator and design a cheap test for it.
experiment-canvas.zh: 挑出最不靠谱的那条痛点缓解或收益创造,为它设计最便宜的实验。
